title: F2 condo unit-lot BBL 1000041001 returns [] (billing-lot semantics)
capture_method: live curl GET by M1-T002 producer, tokenless, single KB-scale request (polite shared-pool use)
notes: Unit lots 1001-6999 have no PLUTO record; the complex lives under the billing BBL. This is a legitimate no_match with a condo explanation, never a connector error.
